name: paralog_family_immunoglobulin
description: Immunoglobulin heavy- and light-chain loci: IGH on chr14q32 (~1.25 Mb, ~50 functional V, 23 D, 6 J, 9 C segments including IGHG1-4, IGHA1-2, IGHM, IGHE, IGHD), IGK on chr2p11 (~1.8 Mb), IGL on chr22q11 (~1.05 Mb). C-region paralogs (IGHG1/2/3/4, IGHA1/2) share 90-95% identity and require paralog-specific variants (PSVs) for copy assignment. V genes show high intra-locus duplication and recombine somatically (V(D)J) so a single read may span the rearranged junction. The locus also carries the IGHGP pseudogene (90.7% identity to IGHG4 with 155 fixed PSVs).
